title: MEGABOOBS 🔞
description:
Welcome to MEGABOOBS 🔞— where the heroines are absurdly stacked, the swarms are relentless, and the content is as explicit as you hoped.

In this auto-shooter roguelite, you control thick, curvaceous fighters as they mow down hordes while everything gets bigger the longer you survive: enemies, bosses, numbers… and chest sizes. Position your heroine carefully — every decision has very physical consequences.

Features
🔥 Extremely explicit 2D adult content: full nudity, sexual animations, hentai scenes, and multiple fetishes.
💥 Broken synergistic builds that turn you into an unstoppable force.
🍑 Expanding roster of thicc heroines, each with unique abilities and unlockable intimate scenes.
🎥 Dynamic camera that knows exactly what players want to see.
♾️ Meta progression and endless replayability.
description_short: A fully NSFW 3D survivor roguelite packed with massive, hyper-proportioned heroines, intense action, and uncensored adult content. Stack powerful builds, survive endless hordes, and unlock highly explicit hentai scenes as you push deeper into the run.
